BT adapter id:: on Linux: number of Bluetooth adapter (0 = hci0):
Delay Away:: How long (in minutes) should be a device not detected before it's marked as away' (>=1):
External Network Scan Delay:: Delay in minutes between External Network IP scan (0 = no scan):
Long Warning Message:: Use long message text with description for warnings:
Max UWZ vars:: How many seperate messages  0=all messages together:
Printer Delay:: Delay in minutes between printer fill check (>=100):
UWZ Delay:: Delay in minutes between UWZ scans 0=no UWZ scan:
arp-scan cmdline:: Arp-Scan command line, need to be changed if default interface is not first
description: IP can be name or number (like fritz.box or 168.192.0.1). Bluetooth is always '01:23:45:67:89:ab', either or both of them have to be there.
dont forget to save config!: Don't forget to save the config before restart of adapter!
known BT addresses:: BT-addresses which are known and should not generate 'unknown' entries separated by ',':
known IP addresses:: IP-addresses which are known and should not generate 'unknown' entries separated by ',':
l2ponly: use l2ping instead of BT scan
Delay in seconds between scans, >=15 and: Delay in seconds between scans, >=15 and <=300 seconds
Delay in minutes after which an item is: Delay in minutes after which an item is set to be away.
The BT adapter id (x in hcix), -1 for fi: The BT adapter id (x in hcix), -1 for first, or 0-9 for specific used for other than noble
Time in minutes after which external net: Time in minutes after which external network IP is checked, 0 = off
Time in minutes aftzer which printer ink: Time in minutes aftzer which printer ink fill is checked, 0 = off
Time in minutes after UWZ will be checke: Time in minutes after UWZ will be checked, 0 = off
arp-scan command line arguments to be us: arp-scan command line arguments to be used.
List of known IP's which should not be f: List of known IP's which should not be flagged as unknown!
List of known BT mac's which should not: List of known BT mac's which should not be flagged as unknown!
Name: Name
